app.title: Aboodhairsalon — Management space
app.description: Run your business: bookings, register, team, stock.

errors.selectAndEnterPassword: Select your name and enter your password.

openingHours.copyTitle: Copy this schedule to other days

trial.expired: Your free trial has ended. Contact us to keep using Aboodhairsalon.

auditLog.sectionHint: All sensitive changes (sales, bookings, client profiles, team…) are tracked automatically.
auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.description: The 50 most recent changes for this tenant. Filter by table optional.
auditLog.errorLoading: Failed to load the audit log. Try again.

push.title: Push notifications
push.subtitle: Get an alert on this device whenever a client books online.
push.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications. Install the app on your home screen (PWA) to enable.
push.notConfigured: Notifications are not configured for this business. Ask your admin to set the VAPID keys.
push.errorPermissionDenied: You denied notifications in your browser. Re-allow them in the site settings.
push.errorNotConfigured: Notifications are not configured on the server (missing VAPID keys).

birthdays.title: Birthdays
birthdays.messageTemplate:
Hi {firstName}, the whole {salonName} team wishes you a very happy birthday! 🎂

To celebrate, enjoy 20% off your next service. We can't wait to see you again.
birthdays.messageTemplateNoName:
Hi, the whole {salonName} team wishes you a very happy birthday! 🎂

To celebrate, enjoy 20% off your next service. We can't wait to see you again.

errors.invalidMapsUrl: Invalid Google Maps link — must start with https://.
errors.invalidImageFormat: Invalid image format. Expected PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
errors.ambiguousEmail: Multiple profiles found for this email. Contact the salon or use your phone.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.settingsRowMissing: Update failed: settings record not found.

errors.noCashierAccessToRevoke: This person has no Cashier access to revoke.
errors.rateLimited: Too many admin actions in a short time. Please wait a few minutes before retrying.
errors.saleNotRefundable: This sale cannot be refunded (incompatible status).
errors.refundExceedsRemaining: Amount too high: only {remaining} cents remain refundable.
errors.emailNotConfigured: Email sending is not configured for this salon. Ask your admin to set the Resend API key.
errors.noClientEmail: No email on file for this client — cannot send the receipt.
errors.photoTooLarge: This photo is too large (max 5 MB after compression).

dashboard.emptyStateSubtitle: Indicators will animate as soon as you have your first bookings and transactions.

perfBarber.title: Performance by barber

perfBarber.empty: No barbers in the team yet.

stockAlerts.title: Stock alerts
stockAlerts.allOk: All stock levels are above threshold.

team.title: Your team
team.subtitle: Barbers, cashiers and other roles — full editing.

todaysCashier.label: On the register today
todaysCashier.hintBefore: The register will show this name in the header of

team.removeRoleTitle: Remove only the barber role (keep the cashier role)
team.removeRoleTitleCashier: Remove only the cashier role (keep the barber role)

barbersSection.removeTitleRole: Remove the barber role (they remain a cashier)
barbersSection.emptySubtitle: Add your cutters so they show up in the booking flow.

confirmDelete.title: Confirm deletion
confirmDelete.barberAlsoCashierHint: Since {firstName} is also a cashier, they remain in the Cashier section. To delete them completely, first remove the barber role then the cashier role.
confirmDelete.cashierAlsoBarberHint: Since {firstName} is also a barber, they remain in the Barbers section. To delete them completely, first remove the cashier role then the barber role.
confirmDelete.pauseHint: Tip: if it's a temporary leave, use “Pause” instead to keep the history.

cashiersSection.accessHintNotConfigured: Can't sign in to the register yet.
cashiersSection.emptySubtitle: Add your first welcome person to assign them to the register. A polyvalent barber can also handle the register — check both roles.

customSection.emptySubtitle: Add a member or assign this section in an existing member's profile.

editModal.photoTooLarge: Photo too large ({size} kB). Pick an image under 1.2 MB.
editModal.photoHintConfigured: Profile photo — shown in the app & cashier header
editModal.rolesHintBoth: This person will appear in both team sections.
editModal.rolesHintSingle: Check both roles for a versatile profile.
editModal.categoryHint: Pick this person's section (click again to unassign).

reviews.title: Salon reviews
reviews.subtitle: Track the average rating and read every review posted by your clients, filtered by barber.
reviews.emptyHint: Reviews appear here as soon as your clients rate their visits from the booking space, “My visits” tab.

reservations.title: All bookings
reservations.subtitle: All appointments — past, present and upcoming.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: The services offered, their duration and pricing.

stats.title: Product performance

stats.empty: No product sales for this period. Sell a few items from the Register to see your top sellers here.

clients.title: Your clients
clients.subtitle: Profiles created from the booking space. Edit a record, view appointment history and spot this month's birthdays.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or email…
clients.emptyHintBefore: Clients create their profile from the booking space

settings.subtitle: This information appears in every space header, on the client booking page and in transactional emails.

identity.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG · max 800 kb · cropped to circle in the header
identity.logoTooLarge: Logo too large ({size} kB). Maximum 800 kB. Compress or resize the image then try again.

address.mapsUrlHint: Google Maps share link of your exact pin. If left empty, the app will search your address automatically.

tax.rateHint: 0 = no VAT shown on receipts. Only set this if you are VAT-registered.

emailSender.label: Email sender address (optional)
emailSender.hint: Ex. noreply@yoursalon.com. Empty = emails will be sent from noreply@aboodhairsalon.com. Prerequisite: domain verified in Resend (DKIM + SPF + DMARC in your DNS).

gallery.hint: Photos displayed on the client app home screen (salon interior, work showcases, team…). Drop multiple files at once.
gallery.dropZone: Drop photos here or click to browse

cashierAccess.unexpectedError: Unexpected error. Check the server configuration.

manage.title: Cashier access active
manage.subtitleAfter: signs in with their name on
manage.noPasswordHint: Passwords aren't viewable. If forgotten, use “Reset”.

reset.introAfter: . The old one stops working immediately.

revoke.explanation: Their sign-in account is deleted: they won't be able to open the register. You can recreate access later. For a temporary absence, use “Pause” instead.

errors.slotTaken: This slot was just taken. Please choose another time.

receiptQR.title: Sale complete
receiptQR.scanHint: to find their receipt and new loyalty points in their space.
receiptQR.noClient: No client attached — no QR code to show.
receiptQR.emailSentToast: Receipt sent to the client by email.

modal.title: New client
modal.description: Phone and email are required — they're used to link the sale, accrue loyalty points, and let the client find their receipt in their space.
modal.errorEmailRequired: Email is required to send the receipt to the client.

today.title: Today's diary
today.confirmNoShow: Mark {name} as no-show? The slot will be released.
today.confirmCancel: Cancel the appointment for {name}? The slot will be released.

clientsToCheckout.subheader: Tap a booking to load it into the ticket on the right

addExtras.emptyDraft: Tap to add extras to this booking

pos.title: Direct sale
pos.surplusSubheader: Description + amount → added straight to the ticket on the right
pos.discountSubheader: Description + amount → subtracted from the ticket total

payment.surplusDescriptionRequired: Description required to confirm a surcharge.

log.resendEmailAria: Resend the receipt by email to the client

refundModal.title: Refund this sale
refundModal.warning: Refunds are final. The sale stays in history tagged as “Refunded”, but the refunded amount leaves your revenue and the client's loyalty points are reversed proportionally.
refundModal.errorLocalSale: This sale isn't saved yet. Wait a few seconds and try again.
refundModal.errorAmountInvalid: Invalid amount. Must be between 0 and {max}.

errors.alreadyReviewed: You have already rated this visit.
errors.ambiguousEmail: Several accounts found for this email. Contact the salon to merge them or use your phone number.
errors.bookingNotCancellable: This booking can no longer be cancelled.
errors.bookingTooSoonToCancel: Too late to cancel online (less than 2h before). Please contact the salon directly.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests — wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.phoneAlreadyLinked: This phone is already linked to another account ({email}). Please sign in with that email instead.
errors.tokenInvalid: Link expired or invalid. Sign in with your email address.

pwa.title: Add to home screen

pwa.iosStep1After: at the bottom of the screen (Share icon)
pwa.iosStep3: Confirm with “Add”. The app will be available like any other.
pwa.inAppSubtitle: To add {name} to your home screen, open this link in Safari or Chrome.
pwa.inAppStep1: Tap the “…” button at the top right or bottom.

booking.noSlots: No slots available on this day. Please pick another date.
booking.registerRequiredHint: Quick sign-up required — your details are saved for reminders and your loyalty program.
booking.cashbackTeaser: You'll earn {amount} cashback for your next visit.
booking.punctualityNotice: Availability can't be guaranteed if you arrive late — please respect your booked time.
booking.regDobHint: So you can receive a gift on your birthday 🎁
booking.paymentNotice: Payment is taken at the salon after the service.

errors.emailRequired: A valid email address is required.

booking.confirmedSubtitle: Your appointment is booked. Please arrive a few minutes early.

mine.title: Your history

info.emptySubtitle: The salon hasn't filled in its details yet.

reviewsModal.emptySubtitleNamed: Be the first to rate {name} after your visit.

errors.emailOrPhoneRequired: Enter your email or phone number.
errors.mustSetPassword: You don't have a password yet. Tap "Create or reset my password" below to set one.
errors.accountNotFound: No account found. Book first, or check your entry.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.phoneAlreadyLinked: This phone is already linked to an account ({email}). Please sign in with that email instead.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your appointments and loyalty points.
login.resetSent: If an account exists, a link to set your password has just been sent to your account's email address. Don't forget to check your spam folder.
login.demoMode: Demo mode — sign in not available.
login.firstVisitHint: Already booked? Enter your email or phone, then "Create or reset my password": a link will be sent to your booking email. No account yet? Book first — your account is created with the email you provide.

setPassword.title: Your password
setPassword.subtitle: Choose a password to secure access to your account (bookings, cashback).

errors.linkInvalid: Invalid or expired link. Request a new reset email.
errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

create.subtitle: Complete your profile to earn loyalty points.
create.dobHint: So you can receive a gift on your birthday 🎁

loyalty.rule: 1 point per EGP spent · every paid service counts
loyalty.cashbackRule: 2.5% of every visit goes to your cashback · {points} points earned

reviews.allSubmitted: All your reviews are submitted. Thank you!

edit.dangerDescription: Permanently deletes your profile and access to this salon. Your purchases remain on file (no longer linked to your identity) for salon accounting.

recover.title: Set my password
recover.intro: Choose a new password — you'll be signed in to your space right after.
recover.error: Update failed. The link may have expired — try again.

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.bodyAfter: , a reset link has just been sent. Open it to set a new password.
sent.spamHint: Don't forget to check your spam folder. The link is valid for one hour.

request.title: Reset my access
request.intro: Enter the email of your management account — we'll send a secure link to choose a new password.
request.error: Couldn't send the email right now. Try again in a moment.

hero.tagline: Sharp cuts, clean beard work and quiet rooms. Walk in, or book your seat in under a minute.

services.tagline: From a clean fade to a full grooming routine — straightforward pricing, no surprises.

about.description: A salon for men who care about the details — the cut, the line, the finish. We work with patience, with the right tools, and with respect for the chair you're sitting in.

cta.tagline: Pick a time, pick a chair, walk in to your appointment.
